message:
Running command: # AFRL/AFRH write mask is 0xFFFFFFFF when unlocked (lckr_locked = 0)
# ODR is 16-bit, MODER is 32-bit
# Let's check the prdata_mux for ODR
grep -n "prdata_mux.*odr\|odr.*prdata\|sel_odr.*prdata\|ADDR_ODR" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_GPIO/rtl/nc_gpio.v | head -10
